name: google-meet-auto-admit
description: Chrome extension that automatically admits people to Google Meet calls

scripts.version:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node -p "require('./package.json').version" > VERSION && node update-manifest-version.js
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && node -p "require('./package.json').version" > VERSION && node update-manifest-version.js
scripts.version:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && node -p "require('./package.json').version" > VERSION && node update-manifest-version.js
